items.text: Hi {PlayerName}! Want to feel the thrill of the ride in total safety? You should try our motorbike simulator!
It's an AI-powered training system that we, the Biomatic Club, built with the Psychological Threshold Alternative Therapy Society. Right now, we're looking for test riders!
The thing is—the simulator's grown an attitude and is being super selective about its riders, which is exactly why we need a skilled rider like you!
I've sent you the coordinates. This is a new version still under wraps, so it's a totally new experience guaranteed!
